name: Southern Dunes Golf Course
about: Southern Dunes Golf Course is a golf facility offering both on-course play and indoor TrackMan simulator sessions. The venue operates with a traditional course booking system and features a comprehensive membership program with various tiers. Amenities include a pro shop, practice facility with PGA staff for lessons, and event spaces for gatherings. The pricing is presented as competitive, with a stated 24-hour cancellation policy for group reservations.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced TrackMan simulator technology for realistic indoor play and swing analysis
Comprehensive membership options offering access to both the course and simulators
On-site PGA instruction available for players seeking to improve their game
Versatile event spaces suitable for corporate outings and private parties

food_and_drink.notes: Food, drinks, and snacks are available for purchase at the 19th Hole located inside the clubhouse.
A full bar is available at the 19th Hole. Outside coolers and alcoholic beverages are strictly prohibited.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not explicitly state if clubs are provided. It is recommended to bring your own set of clubs for the best experience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: Outside coolers and alcoholic beverages are strictly prohibited. Food, drinks, and snacks are available for purchase at the 19th Hole located inside the clubhouse.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes on a simulator?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the average time required to complete a full 18-hole round on their simulators.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The website does not provide specific information regarding child-friendly features, age restrictions, or junior programs.
